articles.title: US authorities freeze $344M in crypto linked to Iran
articles.description: The announced crypto freeze came just one day after Tether said it had frozen $344 million of its USDt stablecoin in response to a request from US law enforcement.

articles.title: U.S. CFTC adds New York to string of states its suing to stop prediction market pushback
articles.description: The federal regulator has been suing states that seek to curtail prediction markets activity and claim it should be deemed state-regulated gaming.

articles.title: Bitcoin developer Paul Sztorc announces BTC hard fork called eCash
articles.description: The hard fork will introduce a new, competing layer-1 blockchain and seven layer-2 scaling networks, according to Sztorc's announcement.

articles.title: Cohere acquires, merges with Germany-based startup to create a ‘transatlantic AI powerhouse’
articles.description: Cohere, the Canada-based AI company that makes AI tools for businesses in regulated industries, announced Friday it would merge with Aleph Alpha, a German company that also builds AI systems for businesses and governments.
